zh.Alfaro, La Rioja, España: 西班牙拉 利奧亞阿爾法羅
zh.lifeSummary: 當Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri於1250年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安索里亞艾爾 波格 德 奧斯馬-達德 德 奧斯馬貝拉斯科時，她的父親Diego López de Velascuri21歲，母親María Fernández de Rojas18歲。她於1277年與Sancho Pérez de Ayala在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1288年在西班牙享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri于1250年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安索里亞艾爾 波格 德 奧斯馬-達德 德 奧斯馬貝拉斯科时，她的父亲Diego López de Velascuri21岁，母亲María Fernández de Rojas18岁。她于1277年与Sancho Pérez de Ayala在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1288年在西班牙享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Díaz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Carlos, Luis, Manuel, Jesus, Francisco, Jorge, Rafael, Miguel, Pedro, Roberto.
Spanish (Díaz): patronymic from the medieval personal name Didacus (see Diego ).

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Spanish surname (see 1 above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Diazdeleon
meanings: Spanish: combination of the surname Díaz (see Diaz ) and the name León (see Leon ) with the preposition de ‘of’.

variants.name: Diego
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Francisco, Juan, Fernando, Jose, Miguel, Mario, Maximo, Salvador, Aida, Ana, Domingo.

Spanish: from the very common male personal name Diego, which in the Spanish-speaking world is usually taken to be a shortened form of Santiago . However, this may be only a folk etymology. The personal name is found in the Middle Ages in the Latin forms Didacus and Didagus, probably a derivative of Greek didachē ‘doctrine, teaching’. However, in view of the fact that this personal name is unknown outside the Iberian Peninsula, it may actually have a pre-Roman origin.

variants.name: Diez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Juan, Fernando, Pedro, Rafael, Roberto, Angel, Eduardo, Mario, Ricardo.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

en.lifeSummary: When Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri was born in 1250, in Velasco, El Burgo de Osma-Ciudad de Osma, Soria, Castilla y León, Spain, her father, Diego López de Velascuri, was 21 and her mother, María Fernández de Rojas, was 18. She married Sancho Pérez de Ayala in 1277, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1288, in Spain, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri est née en 1250, à Velasco, El Burgo de Osma-Ciudad de Osma, Soria, Castilla y León, Espagne, son père, Diego López de Velascuri, avait 21 ans et sa mère, María Fernández de Rojas, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sancho Pérez de Ayala en 1277, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1288, à Espagne, à l’âge de 38 ans.

Sie hat 1277 in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien Sancho Pérez de Ayala geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1288 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Spanien.

Lei sposato Sancho Pérez de Ayala nel 1277, nel Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1288, nel Spagna, all'età di 38 anni.

ko.Velasco, Burgo de Osma-Ciudad de Osma, S: 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 소리아 엘 버고 데 오스마-시우다드 데 오스마 벨래스코
ko.lifeSummary: Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri(이)가 1250년 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 소리아 엘 버고 데 오스마-시우다드 데 오스마 벨래스코에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Diego López de Velascuri(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 María Fernández de Rojas(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1277년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 Sancho Pérez de Ayala(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1288년 스페인에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri nasceu em 1250, em Velasco, El Burgo de Osma-Ciudad de Osma, Soria, Castilla y León, Espanha, seu pai, Diego López de Velascuri, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, María Fernández de Rojas, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sancho Pérez de Ayala em 1277, em Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1288, em Espanha, com 38 anos.

ru.Velasco, Burgo de Osma-Ciudad de Osma, S: веласко, эл бурго де осма-сюдад де осма, соря, кастилла и леoн, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri родилась в 1250 г. в местности веласко, эл бурго де осма-сюдад де осма, соря, кастилла и леoн, Испания, её отцу по имени Diego López de Velascuri было 21 год, а матери, которую звали María Fernández de Rojas, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sancho Pérez de Ayala в 1277 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1288 г. в местности Испания в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri nació en 1250, en Velasco, El Burgo de Osma-Ciudad de Osma, Soria, Castilla y León, España, su papá, Diego López de Velascuri, tenía 21 años y su mamá, María Fernández de Rojas, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Sancho Pérez de Ayala en 1277, en Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1288, en España, a la edad de 38 años.
